sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90605" key="prou+pergasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προϋπ-εργᾰσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n90605.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">preparation, previous defence of what one is going to say</tr_>, Lat. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">praemunitio</tr_>, as a form of Rhetoric, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προπαρασκευή</ref></xr>, Rufinianus <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Rhet.Lat.Min.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.46</biblScope> </bibl> Halm).</sense> </entryFree>
